Module 4: Introduction
!
Executive Summary
Congratulations - you’ve made it to Module 4! It is so awesome that you’ve
made it this far. I’ve been through many programs and there’s always a
huge drop off from Module 1 to 2.
The first couple modules of PLF are conceptual, big picture strategies. Now
it’s all about the Internal Launch - this is only to your list, but more
advanced than the Seed Launch.
The Internal Launch is the heart and soul of Product Launch Formula.
These are my favorite kind of launches - they’re simpler and more elegant,
but still with high return.
Seed Launches are great because they’re simple. JV Launches are great
too, because they’re larger and more rewarding. But an Internal Launch is
in the middle and sets you up for your JV Launch.
You can normally reuse your Internal Launch content for your JV Launch
It may seem complicated at first, but just do it. There is no failure and you’ll
learn a lot from this launch. Don’t get intimidated and remember it’s all
about baby steps.
I’m going to show you how to prepare prelaunch content and then we’ll go
from there. Take notes and take part in the community - we need you. I
!
